closed_loop_dependency_audit.claim_boundary: This audit measures dependence on expert-centered proposals, nearest-demo learned proposals, behavior-cloned learned proposals, state heuristics, and fallback gates; it does not by itself claim real-robot or broad manipulation success.

closed_loop_learned_ebm_rollout_diagnost.claim_boundary: Diagnostic only; variants expose expert-centering, learned-demo proposal, behavior-cloned proposal, state-heuristic proposal, and fallback-gate dependence and do not support real-robot claims.

dependency_audit.claim_boundary: This audit measures dependence on expert-centered proposals, nearest-demo learned proposals, behavior-cloned learned proposals, state heuristics, and fallback gates; it does not by itself claim real-robot or broad manipulation success.
